owner_context: Alex / Lantern OS / COMET LEAP / tabletop fantasy campaign art
core_rule: Local first. Canva/GPT/cloud tools are adapters only. Generate, render, validate, and ledger locally first.
plot_lock: Do not lose the plot: every report must name the operator directive, promoted systems, evidence, boundaries, and next action.
Every report includes tables plus at least one graph/metric visualization when useful.
Raw sensitive activity logs are never public evidence; use sanitized aggregates only.
Speculative quantum immortality content stays philosophy/safety context, never health/survival/marketing proof.

modes: Tony Garage / Arc Reactor status cockpit
motifs: fully armored and draped fictional tabletop fantasy figures
no faces / masks / silhouettes rather than portrait likeness
dwarf urban druid in power armor holding a pure-light ring lantern
glowing wish-door or portal treated as a symbolic threshold
masked guardian shield-forms with fog-and-light wings
masked adventuring party implied in stormlit distance
marble clouds, spectral light, heroic restrained mood

allowed: original tabletop fantasy concepts from the operator
held: copying protected rulebook text or official art
claiming Canva generated hidden assets after failure
